title: HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!
